footer.tagline: The trusted marketplace for campus communities. Buy, sell, and trade safely with fellow students.

home.heroSubtitle: Buy, sell, and trade second-hand items with verified students. From textbooks to furniture, find great deals right on your campus.
home.emptyCategory: No items in this category yet
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of students already using Suki to buy and sell on campus.

exchange.title: Item Exchange
exchange.subtitle: Find products available for exchange with other students
exchange.noResults: No exchange items found matching your search.

landing.heroSubtitle: The safest marketplace for university students to buy, sell, and trade second-hand items on campus. No shipping, no scams, just simple local exchanges.

about.label: About Suki
about.text1: Suki was born from a simple observation: students have stuff they do not need, and other students need stuff they cannot afford new. We created a safe, campus-focused marketplace that eliminates the risks of traditional online trading.
about.text2: Every user is verified with their university email, every transaction happens on campus, and our community ratings ensure you are always dealing with trusted peers.

verified.title: Verified Users
verified.desc: Every account is tied to a valid university email for maximum security.

campus.title: On-Campus Only
campus.desc: Meet and exchange at designated safe spots on your campus.

chat.title: In-App Chat
chat.desc: Negotiate and arrange meetings without sharing personal info.

ratings.title: Trust Ratings
ratings.desc: Build your reputation with every successful transaction.

items.title: Smart Listings
items.desc: Snap a photo, add a description, and list your item in under 30 seconds. AI-powered suggestions help you price it right.

items.title: Campus Search
items.desc: Browse items available exclusively on your campus. Filter by category, price, and distance from your dorm.

items.title: Secure Payments
items.desc: Optional in-app payment protection holds funds until both parties confirm the exchange is complete.

items.title: Wishlist Alerts
items.desc: Looking for something specific? Set up alerts and get notified the moment it becomes available.

items.title: Sustainable Impact
items.desc: Track your environmental contribution. Every item traded is one less in a landfill.

items.title: Graduation Sale
items.desc: Special tools for graduating seniors to quickly sell everything before moving out.

steps.title: Sign Up with Your School Email
steps.desc: Verify your student status with your university email. Your account is instantly linked to your campus community.

steps.title: Browse or List Items
steps.desc: Browse categories from textbooks to furniture. Selling? Snap photos, set your price, and publish to your campus.

steps.title: Meet and Exchange Safely
steps.desc: Arrange a meeting at a designated safe exchange spot and leave a rating after each trade.

cta.title: Ready to start trading?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of students already saving money and reducing waste on campus.

footer.desc: The safest marketplace for university students to buy, sell, and trade second-hand items on campus.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Suki. All rights reserved. Made with ❤️ for students.
